title: Why H Went Up Yesterday
summary: Humanity was one of the strongest crypto movers yesterday, gaining 63.3% over 24 hours while attracting active market participation.
reasons: The token ranked among the strongest 24-hour gainers with a 63.3% move.

The move may reflect renewed momentum interest as traders rotated into recent outperformers.
